title: SecB Totems
description: Simple resourcepack which adds totems of SecB
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac12fe478408703afae5fd97bc383bcb0cad6e79.png)
### The resourcepack adds 10 varieties of totems, which can be obtained by renaming a totem of undying
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a064377f93bbe0b38ab4ffc85997d62d2fc11fd9.png)
[Optifine](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.20.1_HD_U_I6.jar&x=fda0) or [CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) mod Required.

This is funny resource pack which adds some totems. YouTuber - [SecB](https://www.youtube.com/@SecB)
